summary: Plan-only inventory classification for five open PRs. No close, merge, fix, or PR-raising action is safe or allowed by this job; one linked security-sensitive ref is quarantined without affecting unrelated items.

actions.reason: Keep open as the related implementation path for #83902; do not invent a shared canonical or mutate in plan mode.

Related to the Discord/gateway overlap set, but not safely duplicate or superseded because it has a narrow unique timeout scope.
Related stacked/broad PR with unresolved proof and overlap; not safe to close as duplicate because the worker-pool scope is unique.
Standalone active PR with proof but pending changes/author follow-up; keep open without mutation.
Security-shaped linked context is out of ProjectClownfish backlog-cleanup scope and should be routed to central OpenClaw security handling only.
